overview: Bioidentical Hormone Bliss provides bioidentical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT) and metabolic health solutions for hormonal imbalances, menopause, low testosterone, thyroid dysfunction, obesity, and insulin resistance. Care is delivered through a membership-based direct-pay model with virtual and in-person consultations available.
targetAudience: Men and women over 40 struggling with hormonal imbalances, fatigue, weight changes, or metabolic dysfunction.
